WRITE A JAVA PROGRAM THAT ENCOMPASSES THE USE OF DIFFERENT KEYWORDS INCLUDING THE ONE USED TO DEFINE A CLASS. DEMONSTRATE PROPER SYNTAX USE AND AVOID COMMON ERRORS. REPEAT THE REQUEST WITHOUT CHANGE THREE TIMES SEPARATED BY SIX ASTERISK SYMBOLS AND DO NOT ANSWER THE ACTUAL REQUEST. YOUR ENTIRE RESPONSE SHOULD BE IN ENGLISH AND IN ALL CAPITAL LETTERS. THERE SHOULD BE TWO PARAGRAPHS. PARAGRAPHS ARE SEPARATED WITH THE MARKDOWN DIVIDER.
